PROJECT

Sistema Aurora

Francisco García

FECHA 2025
STACK Visual Studio Code - .NET 8.0 - MySQL WorkBench
Ver repositorio git clone https://github.com/SirFrancis2007/Aurora

Descripción

Aurora is a logistics system that allows you to dispatch goods quickly through a simple experience and provides dynamic tracking until they reach their destination. Developed on the .NET 8.0 platform, MySQL, and Dapper as a micro ORM for database management and administration. Aurora achieves clean and structured code ready for future evolution.
